description_long: This rifle features a futuristic design with a predominantly blue and black color scheme, accented by yellow hazard stripes and metallic highlights. The body is angular and robust, with a large, open thumbhole stock at the rear and a long, straight barrel extending forward. The central receiver area is detailed with mechanical components, including a visible scope mounted on top and a detachable box magazine beneath. The grip and trigger assembly are integrated into the main body, with ergonomic shaping for user comfort. The muzzle is simple and unadorned, while the overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials for durability and reduced weight.
description: A futuristic blue and black rifle with yellow hazard stripes, featuring a thumbhole stock, long barrel, and mounted scope.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow barrel and a glimpse of the scope and stock behind.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the rifle, including the thumbhole stock, scope, magazine, and hazard-striped receiver.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the open thumbhole stock and the alignment of the barrel and scope.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, displaying the thumbhole stock, scope, and detailed receiver with hazard stripes.
